blocs.title: Decision Engine
blocs.description: Beam search paths, Monte Carlo stability, policy gate AUTO / HUMAN_REVIEW / NO_GO

blocs.title: Distribution

checks.label: Release pipeline → GHCR (publishes on v* tag)
Versioned release tagged (v* pushed → image on GHCR)

blocs.title: Agent Skills / MCP
blocs.description: Expose pipeline stages as composable agent skills — MCP server, SKILL.md, OpenAPI tool schema

checks.label: MCP server (kube-rca, helm-drift, blast-radius as tools)

blocs.title: Decision Introspection UI
blocs.description: Real-time visualization of beam-search decisions, fallback collectors, and eliminated hypothesis paths

checks.label: Edge-log timeline — routing decisions with reason, confidence, beam_switches
Eliminated-paths panel — archived hypotheses with elimination reason
Fallback-status overlay — per-collector OK / FALLBACK badge + error tooltip
Beam-search tree — SVG dag: active path vs archived branches
Live SSE refresh — introspection panel updates in real time via /stream

blocs.title: Loki Full Integration
blocs.description: Structured log parsing, error clustering, multi-tenant support, WebSocket tail, alert rule ingestion, dashboard log tab

checks.label: Structured log parsing — JSON fields as LokiLog annotations
Error clustering — near-duplicate log lines → LogCluster nodes
Multi-tenant support — X-Scope-OrgID header (LOKI_ORG_ID env var)
LogQL streaming tail — live SSE log events via /loki/api/v1/tail
Loki alert rule ingestion — HAS_LOG_ALERT edges from ruler API
Dashboard Loki tab — log lines with level badge + trace_id link
Integration test case — log-first RCA (no Prometheus signal)

blocs.title: Production Hardening
blocs.description: What separates a validated prototype from a prod-grade deployment: auth, regression guard, supply-chain listing, scoped RBAC, secret management

checks.label: Shared-secret bearer gate on mutating / IDP routes (interim)
API auth — JWT / OIDC per-identity (session + webhook routes)
Golden-scenario regression guard (replay + diff in CI)
Secret management (Vault / external-secrets, no plaintext kubeconfig)

blocs.title: Common Interface (IDP contract)
blocs.description: One canonical verdict shared by the API, the MCP tools and any IDP consumer — frozen schema, single investigation pipeline, published integration contract

checks.label: Canonical verdict model frozen (IncidentReport + schema contract test)
MCP routed through the canonical investigation service

blocs.title: Real-world validation
blocs.description: Move from synthetic fixtures (h001–h010) to real captured incidents — each milestone a recorded artifact, not a claim. The credibility jump.

checks.label: Prometheus wired to real data (a live run captured, not a fixture)
First real incident captured end-to-end (golden run frozen)
Second real incident captured (baseline for regression diff)

blocs.title: Next / Frontier
blocs.description: Forward-looking backlog — each item a deterministic check so the frontier is tracked, not invisible prose. Most are TODO by design; they turn green only when the capability actually lands.

checks.label: Evidence Lineage — dedup raw signals by owner + error family + window → lineage graph
Monte Carlo Tree Search — UCB1 selection + rollout + backprop (replaces greedy beam)
More h-series cases (h013+: network latency, cert expiry, etcd compaction)
Multi-cluster support — analyse multiple contexts in one session
Alertmanager webhook (production) — dedup, grouping, silences, multi-tenant routing
Slack / PagerDuty enrichment — push RCA summary via webhook
